Uses of Class
org.jscience.social.economics.money.Currency

Packages that use Currency
Package
Description
org.jscience.social.economics
Provides comprehensive mathematical models for economic systems, agent-based modeling, and financial analysis.
org.jscience.social.economics.money
Provides classes for monetary and financial operations.
org.jscience.social.politics
Provides the org.jscience.social.politics module.

    Method
    Description

    Returns the currency for the given ISO code.

    Returns the account currency.

    Returns the currency.

    Method
    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Money
    Wallet.getBalance(Currency currency)
    Returns the balance for a specific currency.
    Money
    ChangeSource.getConverted(Money amount, Currency target)
    Converts an amount from one currency to another.
    default Real
    ChangeSource.getExchangeRate(Currency source, Currency target)
    Returns the current exchange rate between two currencies.
    default double
    ChangeSource.getExchangeRateValue(Currency source, Currency target)
    Returns the current exchange rate between two currencies as double.
    Money

    Calculates the total value in a target currency.

    Constructor
